languages.original_text: "Enough. I am ending this battle for its sheer pointlessness."

languages.text: "Довольно. Я прекращаю этот бой за отсутствием хоть какого-то смысла".
"Enough. I am ending this battle for its sheer pointlessness."
languages.original_text: "Довольно. Я прекращаю этот бой за отсутствием хоть какого-то смысла".

traits.locale_text: "Enough. I am ending this battle for its sheer pointlessness."
"Enough. I am ending this battle for its sheer pointlessness."
"Enough. I am ending this battle for its sheer pointlessness."

languages.text: «Basta. Voy a poner fin a esta batalla porque no le veo ningún sentido».
languages.original_text: "Enough. I am ending this battle for its sheer pointlessness."

traits.locale_text: «Basta. Voy a poner fin a esta batalla porque no le veo ningún sentido».

languages.text: “够了。这场战斗毫无意义，我现在就结束它。”
languages.original_text: "Enough. I am ending this battle for its sheer pointlessness."

traits.locale_text: “够了。这场战斗毫无意义，我现在就结束它。”

languages.text: « Assez. Je mets fin à ce combat parce qu'il est purement et simplement futile. »
languages.original_text: "Enough. I am ending this battle for its sheer pointlessness."

traits.locale_text: « Assez. Je mets fin à ce combat parce qu'il est purement et simplement futile. »

languages.text: "Yeter. Sırf anlamsızlığı yüzünden bu savaşı bitiriyorum."
languages.original_text: "Enough. I am ending this battle for its sheer pointlessness."

traits.locale_text: "Yeter. Sırf anlamsızlığı yüzünden bu savaşı bitiriyorum."

languages.text: "Genug. Ich beende diesen Kampf allein wegen seiner Sinnlosigkeit."
languages.original_text: "Enough. I am ending this battle for its sheer pointlessness."

traits.locale_text: "Genug. Ich beende diesen Kampf allein wegen seiner Sinnlosigkeit."

languages.text: 「もう十分だ。この戦いの意味が全くないから、私はこれを終わらせる。」
languages.original_text: "Enough. I am ending this battle for its sheer pointlessness."

traits.locale_text: 「もう十分だ。この戦いの意味が全くないから、私はこれを終わらせる。」
